allow: Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:robinsonmarch@localhost:5432/reviewer" -c "SELECT s.id, a.title, s.submission_type, s.github_url FROM submissions s JOIN assignments a ON s.assignment_id = a.id WHERE s.student_id = 'd820228f-1820-4c7f-8985-e3a6025195f9';")

Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:robinsonmarch@localhost:5432/reviewer" -c "ALTER TABLE submission_overrides ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS closes_at timestamptz;")

Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:robinsonmarch@localhost:5432/reviewer" -c "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_logs \(id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), actor_id uuid, actor_email varchar\(255\), action varchar\(100\) NOT NULL, target_type varchar\(50\), target_id varchar\(255\), details jsonb, created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now\(\)\); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_logs_created_at ON audit_logs\(created_at\); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_logs_actor ON audit_logs\(actor_id\); ALTER TABLE submission_overrides ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS closes_at timestamptz;")
